// note: EXAMPLE — merge the dedicated `gitlab-review` server block into your own VS Code .vscode/mcp.json or user settings. Do not overwrite an existing file. The package is pinned for reproducibility; upgrade it deliberately after compatibility testing. The deny policy hides every write tool except the review workflow's explicit allow-list, and every allowed write requires `_confirmed: true`. GITLAB_READ_ONLY_MODE must remain false for review comments/actions, so use a short-lived token belonging to a user with the minimum project role your approval policy permits.

inputs.description: Short-lived GitLab token for MR review (api scope)
